---
title: "Projections"
description: "The SABRhood daily simulation laboratory."
---

::: {.page-intro .page-intro--dark}
<span class="eyebrow">Daily simulation center</span>

# A forecast is a range of game stories, not one final score

The production page will turn confirmed game inputs into transparent win probabilities, score ranges, matchup drivers, bullpen effects, and player opportunities, with uncertainty visible everywhere.
:::

{{< include includes/daily-projections.html >}}

::: {.section-heading}
<span class="eyebrow">Build path</span>

## What still connects before these become daily public forecasts

The score layer now has a complete output contract. The next work is improving what enters it and proving that the probabilities remain calibrated on games the model has not seen.
:::

::: {.roadmap-grid}
::: {.roadmap-card .is-complete}
<span class="roadmap-step">01</span>

## Score distribution layer

Complete-game draws, win splits, score intervals, close-game likelihood, and reproducible seeds.
:::

::: {.roadmap-card .is-active}
<span class="roadmap-step">02</span>

## Game input assembly

Schedule, probable starters, projected or confirmed lineups, handedness, park, weather, and roster gates.
:::

::: {.roadmap-card}
<span class="roadmap-step">03</span>

## Dynamic bullpen chain

Hook probability, workload, leverage, batter pockets, reliever choice, and performance after each pitching change.
:::

::: {.roadmap-card}
<span class="roadmap-step">04</span>

## Calibration and archive

Rolling backtests, probability calibration, model-version tracking, misses review, and a searchable projection archive.
:::
:::

::: {.method-callout}
Daily public projections will appear here only after time-based backtesting and calibration checks pass. This page intentionally does not present experimental probabilities as betting advice.
:::

{{< include includes/projections-model.html >}}
